title: Submit for Manager Approval (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Submit for Manager Approval" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Submit for Manager Approval

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Submit for Manager Approval is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Submit for Manager Approval
business.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Submit for Manager Approval" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Submit for Manager Approval attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Submit for Manager Approval attempted by a role without permission
Submit for Manager Approval attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Submit for Manager Approval succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Submit for Manager Approval is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Submit for Manager Approval.
permissionTests: Submit for Manager Approval is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Submit for Manager Approval -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: High - core lifecycle step, breaking this blocks the whole module
performanceTests: Submit for Manager Approval completes within accepted UX/API thresholds.
securityTests: Verify role-based access for HR Staff / Record Owner.
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-03 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.impact: High release impact; blocks release if incomplete.
release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Submit for Manager Approval changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Submit for Manager Approval succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Submit for Manager Approval rejected with invalid data
Access: Submit for Manager Approval rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
